Package neqsim.process.safety.esd

Class EmergencyShutdownTestCriterion

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.esd.EmergencyShutdownTestCriterion
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public final class EmergencyShutdownTestCriterion extends Object implements Serializable
Acceptance criterion for an emergency shutdown dynamic test.

Criteria evaluate monitored logical tags, process logic states, simulation errors, or field-data deviations. Logical tags normally come from OperationalTagMap bindings, while direct NeqSim automation addresses can also be used as monitor names.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim contributors
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • EmergencyShutdownTestCriterion

      private EmergencyShutdownTestCriterion(String id, EmergencyShutdownTestCriterion.CriterionType type, String logicalTag, String logicName, double targetValue, String unit, String clause, String severity, String description, String recommendation)
      Creates an acceptance criterion.
      Parameters:
      id - stable criterion identifier
      type - criterion type
      logicalTag - logical tag or automation address used by signal criteria
      logicName - process logic name used by logic criteria
      targetValue - target value used by numeric criteria
      unit - engineering unit for target and monitored values
      clause - standards clause or company requirement reference
      severity - finding severity when the criterion fails
      description - human-readable criterion description
      recommendation - recommended action when the criterion fails

  • Method Details

    • finalAtMost

      public static EmergencyShutdownTestCriterion finalAtMost(String id, String logicalTag, double limit, String unit)
      Creates a criterion requiring the final value to be at most a limit.
      Parameters:
      id - criterion identifier
      logicalTag - monitored logical tag or automation address
      limit - maximum allowed final value
      unit - engineering unit
      Returns:
      acceptance criterion

      limit - minimum allowed final value
      unit - engineering unit
      Returns:
      acceptance criterion

      logicalTag - monitored logical tag or automation address
      minimumDecrease - required decrease from initial to final value

    • evaluate

      EmergencyShutdownTestCriterion.Result evaluate(Map<String,EmergencyShutdownTestResult.SignalStats> signalStats, Map<String,String> logicStates, List<String> errors, Map<String,EmergencyShutdownTestResult.FieldComparison> fieldComparisons)
      Evaluates this criterion against a completed test result.
      Parameters:
      signalStats - monitored signal statistics keyed by logical tag
      logicStates - final logic states keyed by logic name
      errors - simulation errors recorded by the runner
      fieldComparisons - model-to-field comparisons keyed by logical tag
      Returns:
      criterion result

    • toMap

      public Map<String,Object> toMap()
      Converts this criterion to a JSON-ready map.
      Returns:
      ordered map representation

      private static EmergencyShutdownTestCriterion signal(String id, EmergencyShutdownTestCriterion.CriterionType type, String logicalTag, double targetValue, String unit, String description)
      Creates a signal criterion.
      Parameters:
      id - criterion identifier
      type - criterion type
      logicalTag - monitored tag
      targetValue - target value
      unit - engineering unit
      description - criterion description
      Returns:
      acceptance criterion

      Evaluates a monitored signal criterion.

      signalStats - monitored signal statistics
      Returns:
      criterion result

      Evaluates a logic completion criterion.
      Parameters:
      logicStates - logic states keyed by name
      Returns:
      criterion result

      private EmergencyShutdownTestCriterion.Result evaluateFieldComparison(Map<String,EmergencyShutdownTestResult.FieldComparison> fieldComparisons)
      Evaluates a field comparison criterion.
      Parameters:
      fieldComparisons - field comparisons keyed by logical tag
      Returns:
      criterion result

      Selects the signal statistic used by this criterion.

      Returns:
